content.en:
Rumble!!!!

The compression of the origin is completed, so that the body begins to transform.

Ye Tian's physical fitness continued to skyrocket, and the coercion became more and more terrifying.

Gradually, his aura pressed the void into turmoil.

......

Innate Origin Alliance.

The First Elder discovered the Void Domain Movement, and after exploring, he naturally discovered Ye Tian's breakthrough breath.

"It's ......"

The First Patriarch quickly shuttled past.

Since Ye Tian broke through somewhere in the Void Domain, he did not break through in the Human Domain, after all, the Human Domain was too low, and the breakthrough was easy to cause damage to the Human Domain.

Therefore, the first patriarch did not know who broke through at first.

It was only after approaching that he sensed a familiar aura.

"It's Elder Ye Tian, he has broken through !!!"

"What a terrifying breath, as if a wisp of breath can kill me countless times, this breath is too similar to the Qingyuan Country Lord, this is a breakthrough to the Eternal Dao Realm!!!"

The First Patriarch was shocked.

He never thought that Ye Tian would break through to the Eternal Dao Realm so quickly!

He felt that if he didn't leave the Void Realm, no matter how demonic Ye Tian was, it would be difficult to break through to the Eternal Dao Realm, after all, he lacked a lot of inheritance and resources!

But now, Ye Tian has broken his cognition!

Gradually, more and more patriarchs came here.

When they learned that Ye Tian had broken through to the Eternal Dao Realm, they were puzzled one by one.

After all, they didn't even know what the Eternal Dao Realm was!

But Ye Tian's aura when he broke through let them know that Ye Tian's strength was far beyond their imagination.

......

Everywhere in the Void Domain, countless energies poured in, coupled with the various resources prepared by Ye Tian, all of which were swallowed into the body for refining.

It took a long time for him to really break through!

"Eternal Dao Realm, breakthrough!"

Ye Tian was also quite excited.

In the entire Void Domain, he is the only one who has reached this realm!

As soon as he broke through, the first patriarch came to ask for advice.

Hall of the Senate.

Ye Tian sat with the first elder.

The First Elder asked, "Elder Ye Tian, have you broken through to the Eternal Dao Realm?"

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

The First Elder asked, "I wonder if you have left the Void Realm?"

Ye Tian was silent for a while, but still said truthfully: "Yes, I left the Void Domain!"

After all, the First Elder has sheltered the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, and it can be regarded as sheltering the Human Domain.

If there was no First Elder, the Human Domain would have been destroyed long ago, and he would not even have a chance to grow.

In this way, the first patriarch was kind to him, and he naturally could not hide it.

When the First Patriarch heard this, he was very excited: "What is beyond the Void Domain?"

Ye Tian said: "Outside the Void Domain, there are realms, and from the Mythical Spirit Territory at the core of the Mythical Valley, there is a crack leading to the Ancient Realm. The kingdom of Ogu is very powerful, and it is controlled by the lord of Ogu, and there are other kingdoms besides the kingdom of Ogu. But I haven't heard of the Lord of Qingyuan, probably a Lord of a distant region. "

"The Augu Country!"

The first veteran freshman yearns.

Immediately, he asked a lot of information about the Agu Kingdom, and Ye Tian also said it one by one.

When Ye Tian said that the Aogu Kingdom had a large number of Eternal Daoist powerhouses, the small forces all had Eternal Daoist powerhouses, and many Eternal Daoist powerhouses had a hard time, he was suddenly full of emotion.

After thinking about it, he decided not to go to the country of Ogu.

With his strength, going to the ancient realm, wandering at the bottom for countless years, joining a certain force, and being loyal for countless years, he may not be able to break through to the eternal Dao realm.

Moreover, there is no way to come back, and one day he may die in the service of a certain force.

Rather than that, it's better to stay in the Innate Origin Domain Alliance!

Ye Tian is not interested in the position of the first elder, he can continue to be the first elder, and if there is any problem in the void domain, Ye Tian is a strong man, so he doesn't need to worry about it.

Why did he go to the land of Ogu to venture and die?

Maybe one day, Ye Tian will let go of the inheritance, and the Void Domain will give birth to an Eternal Supreme Dao Realm, and he will also be able to become the first batch of beneficiaries!

So, he won't go.

......

"The First Elder is still a wise move, if he wants to go to the Ancient Realm, the Eternal Dao Secret Technique alone will stump him, he can only join other forces and be loyal for a long time, so he can hope to obtain the Eternal Dao Secret Technique. And even if he obtained the Eternal Dao Secret Technique, it would only help him become a powerhouse in the late stage of the Eternal Dao Transformation, and there was still little hope of breaking through the Eternal Dao Realm. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Therefore, it is best for the first patriarch not to go.

After Ye Tian broke through to the Eternal Dao Realm, his other copy bodies were also changed.

Luoxia Valley.

Ye Tian silently replaced his copy body with the copy body of the Eternal Dao Realm, and restrained his breath, so that the Eternal Dao powerhouse could not detect his realm.

But you can't do it, and once you do, you will still be exposed.

"Now that I have broken through to the Eternal Dao Realm, the next thing is to obtain the inheritance of the Eternal Dao Realm, and I have to know what to do next!"

He had obtained a little bit of information before, such as the Eternal Dao Species, and the Eternal Dao Realm was divided into the early stage, middle stage, late stage, and peak, but it was not very clear later.

"Luoxia Pavilion should have the inheritance information of the Eternal Dao Realm, after all, Luoxia Pavilion has an Eternal Dao Realm!"

Subsequently.

He went to find Luo Wushuang and asked.

"Ye Tian, our Luoxia Pavilion does have an Eternal Dao Realm inheritance, but it is only a simple inheritance material. Luo Wushuang said.

"Simple is fine!"

Ye Tian is not very demanding.

Not long after, Luo Wushuang gave the inheritance information to Ye Tian.

After Ye Tian browsed, he had a clear direction.

The cultivation of the Eternal Dao Realm is still divided into the early, middle, late, and peak realms, but in addition, you have to improve the Eternal Sequence to the Dao rules and ascend to the Perfection Realm, and you have to try to comprehend the Eternal Dao Species.

And the Eternal Dao Seed Inheritance is extremely rare, and at present, only the Ancient Realm Lord has a complete Eternal Dao Fruit Inheritance, and the other top powers only have the inferior Eternal Dao Inheritance at most, and they all have various problems.

The Eternal Dao is divided into secondary, lower, medium, high, and perfect Eternal Dao.

It is said that the Eternal Dao Species of the Lord of the Ancient Kingdom is medium, and even if it is medium, it is the envy of countless Eternal Dao Realms.

After condensing the Eternal Dao Seed, you can condense the Eternal Dao Body, and your strength will be terrifyingly improved.

Only the Eternal Dao Realm that condenses the Eternal Dao Body can be regarded as the top Eternal Dao Realm, and the other Eternal Dao Realms, if there is no Eternal Dao Body, even if the cultivation body reaches the peak realm, the combat effectiveness is not strong.
